log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Thri-kreen — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Thri-kreen — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 29 damage. Thri-kreen — Armored Tank HP: 30/59
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Thri-kreen — Armored Tank HP: 15/59

Unknown action type: cast_healing_word

══ ROUND 3 ══
